Core Technology
Why aeroponics changes everything

Roots hang in air, misted with precision nutrient solution every few seconds — maximum oxygen, maximum uptake, zero growing medium. Plants grow up to 3× faster than soil with measurably higher nutritional density.

🌱
Core Technology
Aeroponic Misting
Roots hang in air and are misted with a precise nutrient solution every few seconds. Maximum oxygen, maximum nutrient uptake — no growing medium required. Up to 3× faster growth than soil with higher nutritional density.
95%
Less Water Used
Closed-loop recirculation. Every drop returns to the system — nothing wasted.
📡
Smart Control
Live Dashboards
Monitor EC, pH, temp & humidity from anywhere, 24/7 via web or mobile.
0
Pesticides Used
Sealed environments block pests and pathogens — zero chemicals, ever.
⚡
LED Lighting
Spectrum Control
Programmable full-spectrum LEDs tuned per crop and growth stage.
Installation
Turnkey from Day One
Site planning, logistics, installation, staff training, and ongoing agronomic support — Growspec owns every step from contract to first harvest.
6
Weeks install
24/7
Expert support
Complete Product Range
Four systems, every scale

From plug-in grow cabinets for restaurants to commercial container farms for serious production — every Growspec system runs on the same aeroponic platform.

BioCube Modular

02

BioCube Container

Full commercial container farm — ships anywhere, deploys in 6 weeks

4 Crop Types · 2 Methods · 2 Tier Options
BioCube Container
70m² of growing capacity
in a standard 40ft container
Yield equivalent to almost 3 acres of arable land (leafy greens). Ships worldwide, no planning consent required.
Layout Option A
Single Tier
Single-level aeroponic bucket layout maximising individual plant size. Ideal for tall crops, cannabis, and large fruiting plants.
Layout Option B
Double Tier
Two-tier stacked system doubles plant density per container. Optimised for leafy greens, microgreens and compact fruiting varieties.
Leafy Green
Container
Leafy Green
Lettuce, spinach, Asian greens and mixed salad at commercial scale. Up to 70m² equivalent per container.
Single or double tier layout
Aeroponic bucket system
~3 acres equivalent yield
Enquire →
Microgreen
Container
Microgreen
High-density, fast-cycle microgreen production for wholesale, restaurant supply and retail packing at scale.
7–14 day harvest cycles
Double tier maximises output
Ideal for wholesale supply
Enquire →
Strawberry
Container
Strawberry
Commercial strawberry production unaffected by season or weather. Consistent fruit quality week after week.
Optimised climate programme
Pollination-compatible layout
Premium retail market quality
Enquire →
Cannabis
Container
Cannabis
Medical-grade cannabis at container scale. Two growing methods and two tier configurations — choose what fits your operation.
GMP-compatible clean environment
Full spectrum programmable lighting
Individual plant data monitoring
Method × Tier
Aeroponic — Single Tier
Maximum root oxygenation, largest canopy per plant
Aeroponic — Double Tier
2× plant count, compact varieties, higher kg/m²
Drip Irrigation — Replication
Proven substrate method with full nutrient control

🌡️
ClimateSync™ HVAC
±0.5°C uniformity across full container. CO₂ enrichment, dehumidification, and fresh air management.
🪣
Aeroponic Bucket Tech
Individual sealed bucket per plant with spray nozzle, water inlet, drainage filter and Rockwool planting medium.
📦
Ships as Standard 40ft
No special logistics needed. Arrives fully fitted, plug in power and water — growing within 6 weeks of delivery.

04

Pigma Series

Specialised growing solutions for tall plants and versatile crop programmes

2 Models
Cannabis Specialist
Pigma Omni
The premium Pigma model — purpose-built primarily for medical cannabis, with the vertical clearance and full-canopy lighting to also handle other tall-growing crops like tomatoes, peppers and herbs.
Optimised for plants 80–200cm height
Extended vertical grow space
Full-canopy multi-spectrum lighting
Individual aeroponic bucket per plant
Cannabis (primary) · Tomato · Pepper · Tall herbs
Enquire about Pigma Omni →
Affordable Solution
Pigma Gemini
The accessible Pigma model — a cost-effective aeroponic system for leafy greens, microgreens, herbs, and seedling production. Ideal for entry-level commercial growers and educational institutions.
Leafy greens — lettuce, spinach, chard
Microgreens — fast-cycle production
Herbs — basil, coriander, mint, parsley
Seedlings — propagation & nursery use
Lower entry price point
Enquire about Pigma Gemini →

How It Works
From enquiry to harvest
1

Consultation

Our agronomists assess your goals, site, crops, and market to design the right system.

2

Engineering

We build and test your system at our facility before it ships — zero surprises on site.

3

Installation

Full on-site setup, commissioning, and staff training within 6 weeks of delivery.

4

Growing

You grow. We provide agronomic support, monitoring, and technical backup 24/7.

ROI Calculator

Who We Serve
Every sector, one platform
🍽️

Hospitality

Hotels and restaurants grow premium microgreens and herbs steps from the kitchen — harvested to order, zero supply chain.

📦

Commercial Farming

Scale output with predictable costs, year-round cycles, and premium quality that commands a market premium.

🎓

Education & Research

Universities and institutes deploy our systems for agri-tech R&D, student programmes, and crop science research.

🌍

Food Security

NGOs and governments use BioCube to bring reliable fresh food to remote or climate-stressed regions worldwide.

About Growspec
Built by growers,
engineers & scientists

Growspec was founded on a simple conviction: the future of food production must be independent of geography, season, and chemical inputs. We combine precision engineering with deep agronomic expertise to build systems that work in a hotel kitchen in Dubai as reliably as they do in a research institution in Europe or a food programme in Africa.

01

Global reach, local knowledge

Operating in 40+ countries — our regional agronomists understand local crop markets, regulations, and conditions.

02

Vertical integration

We engineer, manufacture, install, and support every system — one team, one accountability, zero finger-pointing.

03

Science-led growing programmes

Every crop programme is developed by our in-house plant scientists for maximum yield, flavour, and shelf life.
